历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 34554 → 24807 → 25772 → 25893 → 13271, showing an overall upward trend. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced from 25893 to 13271, a shift of about 12622 places, indicating volatility and a clear odd-even year effect. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13271. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Physics Category was 30 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction. The 2026 plan is 26, an increase of 2 from 2025, a small expansion of about 8.3%, slightly easing competition but with limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, with recent rankings stable in the 79–83 range, placing it as an upper-middle level science and engineering institution. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants, attracting attention. In 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), with low attention on short video platforms. Overall, the reputation has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline. Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and other engineering majors are the main recruitment forces, consistent with the university's science and engineering orientation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Liaoning is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600, roughly the same as 2025, indicating stable candidate numbers. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch has been stable in the 360–368 score range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. The university is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, not in Liaoning Province. The proportion of Liaoning enrollment in 2025 is about 8.53%, a significant increase from previous years (about 2–3%), showing an increased weight of this university's recruitment in Liaoning.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the abnormal ranking advance in 2025, the small expansion of 2 places in 2026 (easing competition), and the somewhat negative reputation (inhibiting enthusiasm), it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13955, with a range of 13455–14455.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13455–14455, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<13455), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Software Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>14455), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.
